response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior full-stack engineer with ~15 years of experience, strong testing culture, and some high-throughput systems exposure, but shows no evidence of experimentation platforms, growth engineering, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or A/B testing at scale — the core of this role. Career trajectory is mostly senior-level IC work on product features rather than principal-level, multi-team platform leadership, making this a poor fit for an IC6 growth/experimentation position.
strengths: Deep and broad engineering experience (15+ years) across web, backend, embedded, and mobile with a strong TDD/craftsmanship focus
High-scale distributed systems exposure (low-latency microservices handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Demonstrated initiative and knowledge-sharing: open-source projects, workshops, conference talks, and recent AI-agent/MCP tooling work
concerns: No experimentation, feature-flagging, growth measurement, or statistical analysis experience — the central requirement of the role
No evidence of principal-level scope: no multi-workstream leadership, cross-org platform ownership, or mentoring at IC6 level
Primary stack (TypeScript/Node, DLang) only partially overlaps the listed languages, and no telemetry/metrics infrastructure work is shown

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering fundamentals and scale exposure
